description: Affipro est une marketplace destinée au matching de l'offre et de la demande en affichage publicitaire extérieur.

products.name: AffiPro functionalized MALDI plates

# AFFIPRO
Updated 276 days ago
* ID: 30409963/112
* [affipro.cz](http://affipro.cz)
[CLICK HERE TO SEE DETAILS OF COMPANY CHANGES](https://www.aihitdata.com/company/01D004EB/affipro/history)
The aim of AffiPro products is to offer qualitatively better tools for life science mass spectrometry using novel affinity approaches and fine-tuned surface modifications. AffiPro technologies are built around efficient surface chemistry, high-quality enzyme production and innovative know-how about rapid sample preparation methodologies... AffiPro is part of the National Centrum of Competence supported by the Technology Agency of the Czech Republic, project TN02000132... Affinity surfaces are prepared by ion soft landing, a technique originally coined by R.G. Cooks at Purdue University, and now used for different purposes anywhere, where unique surface modifications are required. AffiPro obtained a license to commercialize patent (US10180435B2) for affinity MALDI plates modified by ambient reactive soft landing. These functionalized MALDI chips can be used to perform lab-on-plate experiments such as enrichment, enzymatic treatment, or immune-purification prior the MALDI-MS detection...
Associated domains: affi-pro.com
